series_metadata.series_title: External individual, agency, and organization training records
series_metadata.series_description: All records related to training provided by the Ohio Department of Public Safety (ODPS) to external individuals, agencies, and organizations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current year plus three years from the date of training. If training is related to grant funding, the date of the federal "Final Financial Report" for the applicable grant. ; Electronic: Retain current year plus three years from the date of training. If training is related to grant funding, the date of the federal "Final Financial Report" for the applicable grant., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
